stemHtml: The Cm (pitching moment) vs alpha (angle of attack) graph is mainly determined by aerofoil and aircraft design, and therefore the pilot has limited influence over the graph. One of the parameters that the pilot can influence is the position of the…

options.b: centre of gravity, which affects the rate of change of Cm with a change in AoA.
options.c: neutral point, for positive or negative Cm.
options.d: centre of pressure, by changing alpha to achieve appropriate Cm value.
